case_title: VANDERMEER, BARBARA FOR RUPKE FAMILY TRUST VS MADDEN, MIKE OF MADDEN & CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANDERMEER, BARBARA FOR RUPKE FAMILY TRUST IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MADDEN, MIKE OF MADDEN & CO., INC. THE COURT FINDS THAT (1) THERE IS NO BREACH OF THE CONTRACT; & (2) THE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION IS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,482.26 FILED BY VANDERMEER, BARBARA FOR RUPKE FAMILY TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT MADDEN, MIKE OF MADDEN & CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

parties.name: MADDEN, MIKE OF MADDEN & CO., INC. 1101 THE EMBARCADERO SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111
